analysis:
- Issue identified: The file `game.js` contains a stray HTML-like closing tag `</code >` at the very end (line 274), which causes a `SyntaxError: Unexpected token '<'` when the browser attempts to parse the JavaScript file.
- Files affected: `game.js`
- Changes needed: Remove the stray `</code >` tag from the end of the `game.js` file.
